population: Children with clinician-established or suspected atopic dermatitis returning for review; infant, adolescent, infection, allergy, growth, sleep, school, and safeguarding contexts need age-appropriate assessment.
setting: UAE pediatric, primary, telehealth, and dermatology follow-up with direct examination when needed.
